summary: Frontend end-to-end testing of Bissal Problem Solver Hub completed successfully. All 6 modules render with data-testid='*-page', navigation works, one CRUD action per module returns HTTP 200, all 4 export endpoints return non-empty files, and Claude-generated typewriter quote renders after journal submit.

issues: Toast notifications appear in top-right and can intercept subsequent button clicks (e.g., export buttons after a submit toast). Not a user-facing bug since toasts auto-dismiss, but consider setting pointer-events:none on the toast container or shorter duration to avoid masking interactive controls during rapid flows.

critical_code_review_comments: Sonner toast region can intercept pointer events on buttons positioned underneath (observed on Water Tracker export). Low priority, but consider toaster.position='bottom-right' or shorter visibleToasts/duration to avoid overlap with primary actions.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 user + 1 user_session in test_database. Created TEST_ prefixed listings in waste, water log (2.5 L), tax entry (1000), currency calculation, journal entry, and 2 skill posts (TEST_Yoga, TEST_Yoga2) during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use same-origin host https://issue-resolver-pro.preview.emergentagent.com for browser tests so the session_token cookie is sent. CORS allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True is in place. Seed users + sessions via mongosh on test_database. All 6 modules verified: nav-{home,waste,water,tax,currency,journal,skills} -> {waste|water|tax|currency|journal|skills}-page. Sonner toasts can intercept clicks — dismiss DOM toasts or use force=True between actions.
